question: Who were the individuals accused in the trial related to the Kiss nightclub tragedy in 2021?
ground_truth: The accused included the nightclub owners Elissandro Spohr and Mauro Hoffmann, as well as band members Marcelo de Jesus dos Santos and producer Luciano Bonilha.
event_desc: Almost nine years later, the trial begins for those accused of the tragedy at the Kiss nightclub, which left 242 victims. Among the accused are the nightclub owners Elissandro Spohr and Mauro Hoffmann; and members of the band who played the night of the incident, musician Marcelo de Jesus dos Santos and producer Luciano Bonilha.
